title: Inventory Rotate
description: Rotate/Cycle through your Inventory with Shift+F. (Mechanic: Stardew Valley)
body:
# ❗Important❗

### **THE KEY KOMBINATION ONLY WORKS IF HOLDING ANY TYPE OF ITEM IN YOUR HAND!**

To find out why look at the chapter at the bottom.

# About

This Datapack adds the Rotating feature from Stardew Valley

Press **Shift+F** to rotate around your Inventory, you cannot rebind the buttons, because this is a datapack and it is really special this uses keybinds in the first place, because this is a new technique. If you have "Swap Item to Offhand" or "Sneak" rebind, use these buttons instead.

![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fe68a9dc94f3d1939dd03ac1bd457a545599c6a.gif)

## Supported Versions
| Version             | Status               |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| 1.21+  | ✅ Supported              |
| 1.20.5 or lower | ❌ Broken due to Minecraft limitations |


### Creative Duplication Bug is now fixed!

 
# Why not with no item in hand?

The datapack detects you pressing the F button by tagging the item in your mainhand with "in mainhand" and the item in your offhand with "in offhand", when they now swap instantly, the datapack knows you have pressed F. Since you cannot tag air, this can't be done without an item in your hand.
# 
Made with ❤️
